text: Baakle bikǝ bia nkpe kalende ku nkpe ale ku butsyi ketsyisǝ betidi, tsya fɛɛ bembokpe fǝ lɛ kɔni etsyi bikǝ biamǝ.
translated: If you want to eat a piece of meat, you must first prepare it and then cook it well before you can eat it.

text: Itsyise Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes ǝbǝ mi ɔflɔ nkǝ wǝǝbǝ ote mi kusu sɛɛ ko biɔyɛ, fɛɛ bíamfo wǝ bɛnɔ. Fɛɛ beyu ku basɔnɔdi bomu áfo wǝ bánɔ. Nya se bínyǝ nyamfo bítsyǝ lekpo tsyaa, bíamfloma mi nsusu biǝ biafo wǝ bɛnɔ.
translated: If you are going to tell me that John is my father, then I will not listen to you. I will not listen to you because you are lying. I will not listen to you because you are a liar. If you are going to say that my mother is a witch, then I will not listen to you.

ref: I say if your wife has not committed some terrible sexual sin, you must not divorce her to marry someone else. If you do, you are unfaithful.”
text: Nyaso nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ osani wǝ ke lɛni wǝ usiǝ, nya inni lǝ disenkpo eso nya úsu úfi usio bambaa, ókpo kusiǝ.”
translated: If you see me in trouble, do not hesitate to help me, for I am in need of your assistance. Do not let me suffer alone, come and help me.

ref: You Pharisees and teachers are show-offs, and you're in for trouble! You give God a tenth of the spices from your garden, such as mint, dill, and cumin. Yet you neglect the more important matters of the Law, such as justice, mercy, and faithfulness. These are the important things you should have done, though you should not have left the others undone either.

text: Yohanes eto bakasebi ǝbǝ bétsyi wǝ ɔkɔ ǝmǝ bésu bébike, nya bésu bátɛyi Yesu.
translated: John, when he saw Jesus coming to him, said, "Behold, the Lamb of God who takes away the sin of the world!"

ref: After King Herod died, an angel from the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph while he was still in Egypt.
text: Se Oka Herodes díkpǝ eto kamaa, Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe utsyuǝ ǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ óte Yosef lǝ kola kǝmiǝ lǝ Egipte.
translated: When King Herod saw that he was deceived, he sent and took all the children in Bethlehem and its vicinity who were under two years old, according to the time which he had determined from the wise men. Then was fulfilled what was spoken by the prophet Jeremiah, saying, "A voice is heard in Ramah, weeping and great mourning, Rachel weeping for her children, and she will not be comforted because they are no more."

text: “Bibu bebe kase dituwinimi lǝ dimǝ laanɔ bobee. Kaanta olokotutu nya keendi kafia kefi keti ǝsuǝ.
translated: The child is not yet old enough to go to the farm. He will go when he is older.

ref: You are a bunch of evil snakes, so how can you say anything good? Your words show what is in your hearts.
text: Mimba lɛbɔ bitsyi lǝ bawa eto kafo ǝsuǝ! Asa sɛɛ aambɔ ketsyi lǝ mi kɛnyɛ! Itsyise lesa nǝ diyi mi ketu ǝsuǝǝ, nnya mi kɛnyɛ lǝǝlǝkǝ katɛyi nɛ.
translated: My mother, I am tired of being treated like this! I will not tolerate it anymore. I am going to leave and find my own way, I will not be controlled by you anymore.

ref: Someone may say, “Here is the Messiah!” or “There he is!” But don't believe it.
text: “Nyaso lǝ utsyuǝ átɛyi mi nkǝ, ‘Bebe! Nnyǝ Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ nkpe mfo o-o,’ nye ‘Nnyǝ wǝ nkpe mmǝǝ,’ mamfo wǝ anɔ.
translated: “Nyaso said to me, ‘Bebe! The Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo is calling you, ‘He is calling you, you must go,’ they said.

ref: Peter began to curse and swear, “I don't know that man!” Right then a rooster crowed,
text: Nya Petro lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Ekpe lǝ lesa saa bǝ ɔnukualɛ minlɛ bɔtɛyi minkǝ Onanto lǝ unǝ mɛ koto lǝ sidia minlɛ bɔtɛyi!” Lefe nǝmfo tutuutu nnya ukusɛ dítǝ kɛnyɛ.
translated: Peter said, “Let the elders come and tell me what is happening to me. I don’t know what is happening to me!” The people were silent and afraid.

ref: That's how it will be at the end of time. Angels will come and separate the evil people from the ones who have done right.
text: Nko ke yuutsyǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto kalokɔ nɛ. Onanto eto batɔnkpe ebubǝ bǝlǝkǝ betidi sɛɛ betsyiko lǝ babua nti.
translated: If you are going to the market, do not go alone. Go with someone so that they can help you carry your things.

ref: The Pharisees and teachers asked Jesus, “Why don't your disciples obey what our ancestors taught us to do? Why do they eat without washing their hands?”
text: Lǝ nyaso Farisifɔ ku afi eto bateasa átɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Beso fǝ mba ntǝkǝko fǝ lǝǝnyifo lǝ bo batekoko ku banakoko eto akpa ǝsuǝ? Nya banlɛ asa budi lǝ mǝ ani mǝflǝmflǝmflǝ ǝsuǝ?”
translated: Then the Pharisees came to Jesus and said to him, “Is it lawful for a man to divorce his wife for any cause?  And they were testing him.

text: yani fǝ kedi kamǝ ǝtsyǝ lǝ Disumuyo mfó lǝ esu lǝ fonko fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ lǝ bekpo ntu lǝ bǝtsyuǝ nti fɛ lǝ efi fǝ kedi kamǝ esu ǝtǝ Onanto.
translated: This is the way of Disumuyo, he who is the owner of the fonko, he who is the owner of the ɔyimitsyuǝ, he who is the owner of the bekpo, he who is the owner of the bǝtsyuǝ, so that he may be the owner of the efi, this is the way of Onanto.

ref: Jesus left and went into one of their synagogues,
text: Mfó nya Yesu dídu úsu Yudafɔ eto Katsyakɔ kǝtsyuǝ.
translated: Jesus was betrayed by one of the twelve disciples, Judas.

ref: You may be sure a servant who is always faithful will be put in charge of everything the master owns.

translated: If you see a man of God sitting in a place of worship, do not greet him with a greeting that is not appropriate.
